title: GoF equivalent test for unbinned fits

posts.name: Lata Panwar
posts.text:
Dear experts,
For HIG-21-011, we are using an unbinned fit with envelop method. As you know that at the unblinding stage, we also perform Goodness-of-fit (GoF) test but it is not possible in our case. Could you please let me know if there is any test equivalent to GoF for such cases?
Thanks,
Lata
posts.cooked_html:
Dear experts,

For HIG-21-011, we are using an unbinned fit with envelop method. As you know that at the unblinding stage, we also perform Goodness-of-fit (GoF) test but it is not possible in our case. Could you please let me know if there is any test equivalent to GoF for such cases?

Thanks,

Lata
